items.claim: Alvin Hines's durability is diminished without steroids.
items.quote: They said Hines off the steroids durability is not going to be as good. And sure enough, he gets caught early and the fight ended

items.claim: Alvin Hines shows a visible loss of muscle tissue compared to his previous fights.
items.quote: visible loss of muscle tissue, man. Big time. I said he had tits. HE'S GOT TITTIES AT WEIGH-INS

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has knockout power in his hands and good combinations.
items.quote: Some knockout power in his hands and some good combinations. I like the way he rips the body.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and coming off two straight losses by finish.
items.quote: 38 years old coming off two straight losses by finish and the last one was a quick KO loss to Archi Long.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is five inches taller than Abdul Hussein.
items.quote: He's tall, too. Five inches taller, which I think is a factor, right?

items.claim: Abdul Hussein controls the lead hand well and works off it when fighting in the southpaw stance.
items.quote: When he stands in the southpaw stance like he did against Tyson Nom, he controls that lead hand real well.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein's grappling was competitive when he fought Muhammad Mokaev.
items.quote: His grappling was competitive with Mohamed Makaya. He was scoring some takedowns.

items.claim: Nursulton Ruziboev has nine wins by decision and has never finished a fight inside the UFC.
items.quote: Nine wins by decision. Never finished the fight inside the UFC.
